pi_items.source: Verified in task.json description, setup_task.sh line 18, export_result.sh line 17, and verifier.py line 40

Task description specifies 'Ford Transit 350 cargo van for garden supplies distribution' - contains all three keywords
Task description specifies '06/01/2024 (June 1, 2024)' which converts to ISO 8601 format 2024-06-01; verifier.py line 42 uses this format
Task description specifies 'Usable Life - Years: 7'; verifier.py line 43 expects this value

GardenWorld is the standard demo dataset in iDempiere confirmed by: (1) env.json description mentions GardenWorld demo data, (2) setup_idempiere.sh confirms GardenWorld seeding, (3) task_utils.sh queries for GardenWorld client, (4) iDempiere documentation confirms GardenWorld as default sample company

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on iDempiere 12 (confirmed in docker-compose.yml), a real open-source ERP system. The task uses the GardenWorld client, a standard sample dataset included with iDempiere. All metadata values are consistent: expected_search_key TRUCK-2024-001, expected_name_fragment 'Ford Transit', expected_description_keywords including Transit/cargo/garden, expected_service_date 2024-06-01 (June 1, 2024), and expected_life_years of 7. The data is synthetic - the specific asset details (Delivery Truck - Ford Transit 2024) are created for this task and do not come from external sources. The iDempiere Fixed Asset module is a real, documented feature in iDempiere 12.
